default.label: Strike Hard
default.description: Press the attack. High risk, high reward.

resultBands.critical: You land a decisive blow. Opponent loses 2 Resolve.
resultBands.success: A clean hit. Opponent loses 1 Resolve.
resultBands.partial: You strike but take the brunt of the counter. Both lose 1 Resolve.
resultBands.failure: Your attack is turned aside. You lose 1 Resolve.

default.label: Hold Ground
default.description: Brace for impact. Recover Resolve on success.

resultBands.critical: You weather the storm and find an opening. You recover 1 Resolve.
resultBands.success: You hold firm. No Resolve lost.
resultBands.partial: A near miss. You lose 1 Resolve but the worst is avoided.
resultBands.failure: The blow lands. You lose 1 Resolve.

default.label: Outmaneuver
default.description: Use speed and cunning over force.

resultBands.critical: You slip past every guard. Opponent loses 2 Resolve.
resultBands.success: You find the gap. Opponent loses 1 Resolve.
resultBands.partial: Clever but not enough. You lose 1 Resolve.
resultBands.criticalFailure: Walked into a trap. You lose 2 Resolve.

default.label: Parley
default.description: Words cut deeper than steel. Requires disposition > -0.5.

resultBands.critical: They falter. Opponent loses 2 Resolve and disposition rises.
resultBands.success: Doubt enters their eyes. Opponent loses 1 Resolve.
resultBands.partial: They listen, then laugh. You lose 1 Resolve.
resultBands.failure: Your words ring hollow. You lose 1 Resolve.
resultBands.criticalFailure: You've only made them angrier. You lose 2 Resolve, disposition falls.

SHIFTING_THE_BURDEN.label: Expose the Lie
SHIFTING_THE_BURDEN.description: Name the dependency that drives them.

resultBands.critical: They crumble. Opponent loses 2 Resolve, disposition shifts.
resultBands.success: A crack appears. Opponent loses 1 Resolve.
resultBands.partial: They deflect. You both lose 1 Resolve.
resultBands.failure: They deny it. You lose 1 Resolve.
resultBands.criticalFailure: You've touched a wound. You lose 2 Resolve.

SHIFTING_THE_BURDEN.label: Strike Hard
SHIFTING_THE_BURDEN.description: Cut through the deflection with force.

SHIFTING_THE_BURDEN.label: Offer a Way Out
SHIFTING_THE_BURDEN.description: Give them an alternative to the burden.

FIXES_THAT_FAIL.label: Patient Pressure
FIXES_THAT_FAIL.description: Let their own fix unravel. Wait and exploit.

resultBands.critical: The flaw opens wide. Opponent loses 2 Resolve.
resultBands.success: The crack widens. Opponent loses 1 Resolve.
resultBands.partial: They patch it in time. Both lose 1 Resolve.
resultBands.failure: The fix holds for now. You lose 1 Resolve.

GROWTH_AND_UNDERINVESTMENT.label: Overwhelm the Gap
GROWTH_AND_UNDERINVESTMENT.description: Push where they're stretched too thin.

resultBands.critical: The gap collapses. Opponent loses 2 Resolve.
resultBands.success: You find the opening. Opponent loses 1 Resolve.
resultBands.partial: They scramble to cover. You lose 1 Resolve.
resultBands.failure: They adapt faster than expected. You lose 1 Resolve.
resultBands.criticalFailure: The gap was bait. You lose 2 Resolve.
